sections.content:

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Find player and yellow dot
blues = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
yellows = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']

for b in blues:
    boundary = b['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    print(f"Player: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

for y in yellows:
    boundary = y['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    print(f"Yellow: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

# Move player RIGHT 2 times to reach col 22
action(['RIGHT', 'RIGHT'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
blues = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
yellows = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'Y']

for b in blues:
    boundary = b['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    print(f"\nAfter 2 RIGHT: Player rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

for y in yellows:
    boundary = y['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    print(f"Yellow: rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', False)}")

# Check if player and yellow overlap or are adjacent
if blues and yellows:
    b = blues[0]
    y = yellows[0]
    b_cols = set(p[1] for p in b['boundary'])
    y_cols = set(p[1] for p in y['boundary'])
    print(f"Player cols: {sorted(b_cols)}")
    print(f"Yellow cols: {sorted(y_cols)}")
    print(f"Overlap: {b_cols & y_cols}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
